title: Sports Authority India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sports Authority India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
